untranslatable_reason: This is a factor-based portfolio construction strategy (Betting Against Beta), not a technical indicator-based trading signal. It requires: (1) calculation of beta coefficients for each asset relative to a global market portfolio, (2) ranking assets by beta, (3) portfolio weighting schemes based on beta ranking, (4) portfolio-level beta rescaling to 1.0, and (5) long/short positions at the portfolio level across multiple asset classes. None of these operations can be expressed using the available technical indicators (price-based, momentum, volatility measures). This strategy operates at the portfolio construction and factor selection level, not at the bar-by-bar technical level.
translation_notes: Signal SSRN_2049939_30 is a quantitative factor strategy requiring statistical beta estimation and portfolio optimization. The allowed indicator set contains only technical indicators suitable for single-asset entry/exit signals. To implement this strategy would require: custom beta calculation module, cross-asset ranking engine, and portfolio-level position sizing logic outside the scope of technical indicator rules.
